name: Samsung Galaxy Smartphones

name: Galaxy Z Fold 8 / Flip 8
notes: Tri-fold concept under evaluation, target sub-14mm folded thickness, AI-powered FlexMode experiences

name: Bespoke AI Refrigerator 2026

notes: All-in-one washer-dryer with AI OptiWash & AI Optimal Dry, digital inverter 25yr warranty

notes: Soil sensor calibration, fabric type ML classification, load weight optimization algorithm
